question: Which layer in a CNN is primarily responsible for reducing the spatial dimensions (width and height) of the input data?

options.A: To reduce the file size of the audio
options.B: To transform the 1D audio signal into a 2D image-like representation for CNNs
options.D: To convert the audio into text

question: In Transfer Learning, what does "freezing" the base model layers (like MobileNetV2) achieve?

options.A: It stops the model from making predictions
options.B: It prevents the pre-trained weights from being updated during training
options.C: It increases the learning rate automatically
options.D: It deletes the weights to start from scratch

question: Which activation function is most commonly used in the final layer of a multi-class classification model to output probabilities?

options.A: It has higher accuracy on all datasets
options.B: It is lightweight and optimized for real-time performance on mobile/embedded devices
options.C: It does not require any training data
options.D: It only works with audio data

question: Which pagination type allows you to "jump" directly to Page 10 by simply changing a number in the web address?
Why is "Infinite Scroll" more difficult to scrape than standard numbered pagination?

options.B: The URL stays the same, and content only loads when a scroll event is triggered
options.D: It requires a paid API key

options.A: The mouse pointer on the screen
options.C: A unique ID or token that acts as a "bookmark" for the next set of data
options.D: A JavaScript function that clicks buttons

question: Which tool is best suited for scraping a website that uses "Load More" buttons?

options.A: It keeps the server from crashing
options.B: It allows for instant page switching because all data is pre-loaded in the browser
options.C: It hides the data from web scrapers
options.D: It makes the initial page load much faster
